title: BillingPolicy
description: A billing policy that defines the association between an Azure subscription and Power Platform environments for pay-as-you-go billing.

id.description: The unique identifier of the billing policy.

name.description: The display name of the billing policy.

location.description: The geographic location of the billing policy.

status.description: The status of the billing policy.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the billing policy was created.

lastModifiedOn.description: The timestamp of the last modification.
